chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-15 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A.No.96/ 2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 18-11-2025. None present for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. = This is date by Court matter. Today neither applicant is in attendance nor his counsel. Non-appearance of the applicant and his counsel shows that they have lost their interest to pursue this case, therefore, instant Civil Revision application alongwith listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE *Saleem*
